content: CPI and NFP (Employment Situation) both release at 8:30am ET on BLS schedule; CPI is second-week-of-month, NFP is first-Friday-of-month, both published only 12-14 days after reference period, and BLS revises schedule dates yearly (published dedicated schedule page) plus revises prior-month figures in the same release - a static hardcoded date list goes stale annually and revisions can retroactively change what an already-flagged historical event window looked like.
